description: Upper Full grain and nubuck leather upper for added durability and style Nubuck leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and on the forefoot for better support Full grain leather on the sides with a perforated design for added style and structure Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Two-toned laces for added attraction Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand badge on lateral side of midfoot and behind the collar Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for extra comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Grooves in a “Pacman” design all over the outsole for better grip
